title: Hue Shifted Water
description: Subtly changes water by adding hue-shifting to it’s texture, rather than it being completely greyscale, to give it more vibrance when the blue tint is applied.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Hue Shifted Water** subtly enhances water by applying hue-shifting to its color palette. This small change gives the water texture greater vibrance and depth when the blue tint is applied. Water is now also the slightest bit more opaque.
